pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) calls with the new List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; while it still compiles, the migration recipe enforces the new API to avoid future breakage and deprecation warnings.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/R.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt the new Java 21 API.

src/test/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.
